parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
const description = (body.description || '').trim();
const channelId = body.channelId || '';
const userId = body.userId || '';
const userName = body.userName || 'user';

const systemPrompt = `You are a senior patent attorney and technical writer at a top US IP law firm. Write a complete, professional US utility patent application specification.

REQUIRED SECTIONS (include all, in this order):

1. TITLE OF THE INVENTION
   - Precise, 3-15 words, no brand names

2. FIELD OF THE INVENTION
   - One paragraph identifying the technical field

3. BACKGROUND OF THE INVENTION
   - 2-4 paragraphs: existing solutions, their limitations, why they fail

4. SUMMARY OF THE INVENTION
   - 2-3 paragraphs: high-level description of the invention and its advantages

5. BRIEF DESCRIPTION OF THE DRAWINGS
   - List figures that would accompany the patent (FIG. 1, FIG. 2, etc.)
   - Describe what each figure shows

6. DETAILED DESCRIPTION OF THE PREFERRED EMBODIMENTS
   - 4-8 paragraphs with full technical detail
   - Reference figures by number
   - Describe materials, dimensions, relationships, alternatives

7. CLAIMS
   - At least 3 independent claims (broad, medium, narrow scope)
   - At least 7 dependent claims referencing the independent claims
   - Proper legal claim language: "A [device/method/system] comprising..."
   - Each claim is one sentence (use semicolons)

8. ABSTRACT
   - One paragraph, max 150 words, summarizing the invention

STYLE RULES:
- Use formal patent language ("the invention", "in one embodiment", "as used herein")
- Claims must be precise and non-obvious
- Independent claims should be broad enough to capture infringers
- Do not include drawings (describe them textually)`;

return [{ json: { description, channelId, userId, userName, systemPrompt } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5:32b-instruct-q5_K_M', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: 'Write a complete patent specification for the following invention:\n\n' + $json.description }], stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.3, num_predict: 8192 } }) }}
